decisions.description: scan-store Redis-first, disk write removed
decisions.rationale: Vercel read-only filesystem. Cross-instance persistence via Redis.

decisions.description: TabStocks @tanstack/react-virtual
decisions.rationale: 2000+ rows DOM bottleneck. Virtual scroll ~95% reduction.

decisions.description: stocks API universeCount/loadedCount/missingCount
decisions.rationale: PRINCIPLE 4: Universe != Loaded. Clear semantics for Product Strategist.

decisions.description: Adopt HERMES-IIC v3.0 operating protocol and memory-first execution
decisions.rationale: Institutional continuity, decision traceability, fail-loud production posture.
decisions.risk_accepted: Higher implementation overhead for logging and governance.
decisions.validation_method: Health/SLA telemetry + type-check/lint + cron watchdog drills.
decisions.rollback_plan: Disable strict gates via env toggles and keep telemetry passive.

decisions.description: Freshness guardrail and SLO trend badges rolled out to Trade/Signals/Watchlist modules (NASDAQ + Europe)
decisions.rationale: Prevent hidden stale-data risk and expose live reliability state to users.
decisions.risk_accepted: Extra periodic health polling in client UI.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lints + health endpoint field validation.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove badge imports and keep backend telemetry only.

decisions.description: Config-driven signal fail-closed guard enabled with stale masking in Signals/Watchlist modules
decisions.rationale: Block stale signal rendering to protect decision integrity.
decisions.risk_accepted: Potential temporary loss of signal visibility during freshness incidents.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lints + stale banner/render block paths.
decisions.rollback_plan: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SIGNAL_FAIL_CLOSED=false to revert to warn-only behavior.

decisions.description: Freshness headers added to health/scan/latest/quotes endpoints for proxy and ops observability
decisions.rationale: Expose stale state at transport layer for monitoring and edge decisions.
decisions.risk_accepted: Slightly larger response headers.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + endpoint contract validation.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove X-Hermes-* headers without changing body schema.

decisions.description: Legal disclaimer strip hardened across NASDAQ/Europe Trade, Signals, and Watchlist modules
decisions.rationale: Increase user-facing risk disclosure where signal decisions are made, not only in global layout footer.
decisions.risk_accepted: Slightly denser module header area.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + visual component integration checks.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove LegalDisclaimerStrip imports from modules and keep layout disclaimer only.

decisions.description: Production API key rotation checklist and env guardrails documented for no-downtime key rollover
decisions.rationale: Operationalize repeatable key rotation and fail-closed defaults before 7/24 production launch.
decisions.risk_accepted: Process overhead during each rotation window.
decisions.validation_method: Runbook + checklist review and smoke checks after env redeploy.
decisions.rollback_plan: Use previous active keys in Vercel env and redeploy.

decisions.description: SLO dashboard wiring expanded in NASDAQ/Europe headers with watchdog and self-heal trend badges
decisions.rationale: Expose operational stability directly in UI for fast incident detection without opening admin pages.
decisions.risk_accepted: Slightly denser header controls on xl screens.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + health payload field mapping check.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove OPS badge blocks and keep freshness badge only.

decisions.description: Analyst category upgraded with EPS revision momentum factor (30d/90d) and coverage depth
decisions.rationale: Reduce static-consensus bias and capture analyst estimate direction as dynamic signal quality input.
decisions.risk_accepted: Revision inputs can be sparse on some symbols; falls back to existing analyst components.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + parser fallback guards + default zero-safe scoring.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove revision fields from ScoreInputMetrics and scoreAnalyst weighting branch.

decisions.description: Tiered cache TTL tuning applied for analyst/dcf/fundamentals with centralized constants mapping
decisions.rationale: Align data freshness with semantic volatility and cut unnecessary refresh pressure on heavy bulk endpoints.
alternatives_rejected: Single BULK TTL for all endpoint classes
decisions.risk_accepted: Longer TTL on stable datasets can delay low-impact updates.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + endpoint cache key compatibility verification.
decisions.rollback_plan: Re-point endpoint calls to CACHE_TTL.BULK or revert constants mapping.

decisions.description: Analyst EPS revision metrics exposed in NASDAQ and Europe Terminal Stocks tables (REV30/REV90) with sortable columns
decisions.rationale: Make analyst momentum signals visible to operators and enable direct rank/sort workflows on revision direction.
alternatives_rejected: Expose only in stock detail view
decisions.risk_accepted: Wider tables on small screens; handled via existing horizontal scroll.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + table render with missing-value fallback.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove REV30/REV90 columns and fields from table SortField/interface mappings.

decisions.description: Cache tier hit telemetry added (memory/redis/disk/origin) and exposed from system health payload
decisions.rationale: Add measurable cache effectiveness by tier to support production tuning and incident triage.
decisions.risk_accepted: Small Redis counter write overhead per cache resolution path.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + health route contract update + monitor key path verification.
decisions.rollback_plan: Disable tier-hit increments and remove tierHits1h from health response schema.

decisions.description: Admin dashboard now surfaces cache tier telemetry and session-level origin trend sparkline
decisions.rationale: Give operators immediate cache efficiency observability and quick drift detection without backend log access.
decisions.risk_accepted: Small additional admin polling load (60s interval).
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + admin payload typing verification.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove ops cache cards/sparkline and revert to base system summary cards.

decisions.description: Analyst EPS revision visibility expanded to Signals/Watchlist modules (NASDAQ + Europe) with revision filters/chips
decisions.rationale: Carry analyst momentum context into action surfaces where users consume cross-signals and watchlist decisions.
alternatives_rejected: Keep revision data only in terminal stock tables
decisions.risk_accepted: Slightly denser table layout in compact widths.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + safe fallback when revision fields are missing.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove REV fields/filters from modules and keep existing signal columns unchanged.

decisions.description: Admin ops alert thresholds added for SLA breach and cache origin ratio warning/critical states
decisions.rationale: Convert raw telemetry into actionable operational states for faster incident triage.
decisions.risk_accepted: Simple static thresholds may need tuning per regime/load profile.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + visual badge rendering and threshold branch checks.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove threshold badges and keep telemetry cards only.

decisions.description: Ops thresholds moved to config/env and exposed via health->admin pipeline
decisions.rationale: Avoid hardcoded alert cutoffs and support runtime tuning without code-level threshold drift.
alternatives_rejected: Hardcoded thresholds in admin UI only
decisions.risk_accepted: Misconfigured env values can shift alert sensitivity.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + admin threshold rendering verification.
decisions.rollback_plan: Fallback to default constants and remove threshold exposure from admin payload.

decisions.description: OPS threshold envs documented in .env.example and operations runbook
decisions.rationale: Ensure production operators can tune alert sensitivity consistently without code edits.
decisions.risk_accepted: Operational misuse if thresholds are changed without monitoring discipline.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + runbook review + admin threshold visibility check.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove OPS env docs and rely on default in-code thresholds.

decisions.description: Europe Signals now supports EPS revision filter chips (Rev Up/Down) and CSV export including REV30/REV90
decisions.rationale: Align Europe cross-signal workflow with analyst revision visibility standards used in NASDAQ modules.
decisions.risk_accepted: Slightly denser filter row on smaller screens.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + export column verification.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove revision chips and CSV revision columns from Europe Signals module.

decisions.description: Europe Watchlist parity completed with CSV export and sortable REV30/REV90 columns
decisions.rationale: Align watchlist decision surfaces with analyst revision-aware workflows and export parity.
alternatives_rejected: No CSV parity for Europe Watchlist
decisions.risk_accepted: More sortable headers can increase UI density on narrow screens.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + sort/export flow verification.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove additional sort handlers and CSV button from Europe Watchlist module.

decisions.description: Shared revision contract added for REV tooltips and CSV header consistency across NASDAQ/Europe Signals and Watchlist modules
decisions.rationale: Prevent drift between modules by centralizing REV30/REV90 tooltip text and CSV header contracts in one source of truth.
decisions.risk_accepted: Shared contract import coupling between modules.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + CSV header and table tooltip smoke checks.
decisions.rollback_plan: Inline per-module header/tooltip constants and remove shared contract module.

decisions.description: Legal disclaimer text centralized and localized with a shared constant across module strips and both main footers
decisions.rationale: Eliminate wording drift and enforce a single compliance-safe disclaimer sentence in NASDAQ and Europe surfaces.
alternatives_rejected: Keep duplicated hardcoded disclaimer strings per component
decisions.risk_accepted: Single-source text change impacts all bound UIs at once.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + string usage verification in LegalDisclaimerStrip/Layout/EuropeLayout.
decisions.rollback_plan: Revert to prior per-file disclaimer strings and remove shared legal-disclaimer constant.

decisions.description: Institutional pre-launch audit v2.1 published with claim revalidation matrix (valid/resolved/missing) against current codebase
decisions.rationale: Prevent stale audit actions by separating already-resolved findings from true remaining launch blockers.
alternatives_rejected: Patch v2.0 informally without written delta audit
decisions.risk_accepted: Delta audit may need frequent refresh as hardening continues.
decisions.validation_method: File-level evidence scan across route/cache/scoring/ui guardrail/admin telemetry paths.
decisions.rollback_plan: Fall back to v2.0 report and manual per-claim verification.

decisions.description: fmp-terminal/stocks route migrated from local raw fetch helper to centralized fmpClient raw fetch path
decisions.rationale: Close launch-blocking resilience gap by inheriting shared timeout/retry/dedup/circuit-breaker behavior on the heaviest terminal route.
alternatives_rejected: Partially migrate only selected endpoint calls
decisions.risk_accepted: Route now depends on centralized client behavior for all bulk calls.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint clean on modified route with unchanged response contract.
decisions.rollback_plan: Reinstate local fmpFetch wrapper in stocks route and remove centralized import.

decisions.description: Central FMP client retry backoff updated with +/-20% jitter to reduce synchronized retry bursts
decisions.rationale: Lower thundering-herd risk during upstream transient failures and align retry behavior with production resilience best practices.
alternatives_rejected: Keep pure exponential backoff without jitter
decisions.risk_accepted: Slightly variable retry latency per request.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint clean and callsite verification for both retry branches.
decisions.rollback_plan: Revert to direct exponential delay formula in fmpClient.

decisions.description: Conflict-state advisory counters added to NASDAQ and Europe Signals without changing locked 6-signal taxonomy
decisions.rationale: Expose technical-vs-AI direction mismatch volume while preserving existing signal contract and UI filtering semantics.
decisions.risk_accepted: Additional compact badge in filter rows increases minor UI density.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint clean; conflict badge rendering path verified by code inspection.
decisions.rollback_plan: Remove conflict counters and advisory badges from signals modules.

decisions.description: Production smoke checklist executed for health/scan/latest/quotes/admin endpoints with temporary local dev server
decisions.rationale: Validate core observability and freshness/header contracts after resilience hardening sequence.
alternatives_rejected: Skip runtime smoke and rely on static checks only
decisions.risk_accepted: Smoke checks in local dev environment may not mirror full production auth/session state.
decisions.validation_method: Runtime endpoint probes + type-check + lint; temporary server terminated after checks.
decisions.rollback_plan: Re-run smoke checklist on previous baseline commit if regression is suspected.

decisions.description: Raw FMP fetch path updated to disable dedup by default to prevent shared Response body consumption errors
decisions.rationale: Centralized client dedup is unsafe for raw Response streams because body is single-consume.
alternatives_rejected: Keep dedup for raw and clone response
decisions.risk_accepted: Slightly higher request volume for concurrent identical raw calls.
decisions.validation_method: Type-check + lint + runtime smoke where /fmp-terminal/stocks returns 200 without prior body-consume error signature.
decisions.rollback_plan: Re-enable raw dedup and move callers to parsed JSON mode if needed.

decisions.description: Deploy-readiness verify pipeline passed (type-check + production build) after resilience hardening sequence
decisions.rationale: Confirm no compile/build regressions before production packaging.
alternatives_rejected: Defer build verification to deployment step
decisions.risk_accepted: Local verify run does not fully emulate production traffic and auth sessions.
decisions.validation_method: npm run verify success with Next.js build artifacts generated.
decisions.rollback_plan: Revert latest hardening commits and rerun verify on previous stable state.

decisions.description: Authenticated admin smoke and fresh mini-scan bootstrap completed; admin ops payload now verified with thresholds and tier-hit telemetry present
decisions.rationale: Close handoff gap by validating protected admin path under real session cookie and confirming freshness pipeline reset path.
decisions.risk_accepted: Smoke used minimal symbol set for bootstrap, not full-universe runtime load.
decisions.validation_method: admin login 200 + admin stats 200 + ops fields present + system health 200 + scan/latest age reset to 0.
decisions.rollback_plan: Re-run authenticated smoke on previous stable build and compare endpoint contracts.

decisions.description: Final production handoff packaging executed with local preflight and endpoint smoke checks; local dev health route showed stale Next chunk module load failure
decisions.rationale: Capture deployment readiness evidence and isolate local runtime artifact issue before Vercel dashboard rollout.
alternatives_rejected: Skip local smoke and rely only on compile/build checks
Treat local 500 as production blocker without artifact diagnosis
decisions.risk_accepted: Local dev server can show false negatives from stale .next chunks until clean restart.
decisions.validation_method: npm run verify PASS + quotes/scan smoke PASS + health endpoint error signature captured (Cannot find module ./1331.js).
decisions.rollback_plan: Stop dev server, clean .next, restart, and re-run smoke set before final production click.

decisions.description: Local runtime artifact incident resolved by clean restart; smoke checks now pass for health/scan/quotes contracts
decisions.rationale: Confirm the previously observed health route 500 was local cache/chunk drift, not deployment package regression.
alternatives_rejected: Treat transient local artifact issue as unresolved blocker
decisions.risk_accepted: Health remains DEGRADED when freshness SLA is breached, which is acceptable for smoke validation.
decisions.validation_method: GET /api/system/health=200(DEGRADED), POST /api/quotes/live=200, GET /api/scan/latest=200, GET /api/admin/stats(no auth)=401 expected.
decisions.rollback_plan: Repeat clean restart and smoke set before production deploy if local dev drifts again.

next_priority: PHASE NEXT+1: execute Vercel dashboard production deploy and run 15-minute post-deploy monitoring checklist
